title: 9 Herbal Teas to Ease Grief in Orphan
description: Avena sativa teas, also known as oat straw tea, has been traditionally used to help people cope with grief. The tea contains a compound called avenacoside, which is believed to have anti-anxiety and antidepressant properties. Avena sativa teas also contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant properties that can help reduce inflammation and promote relaxation.
